x-enumeration-literals.name: Blocked
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that are blocked or frozen. A financial instrument may be unavailable due to external circumstances such as a court order, death of beneficiary or account owner, or bankruptcy. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Borrowed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that have been borrowed from another party.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: CollateralIn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that belong to a third party and that are held for the purpose of collateralisation.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: CollateralOut
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that belong to the safekeeping account indicated within this message, and are deposited with a third party for the purpose of collateralisation.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnLoan
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that have been loaned to a third party.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending Delivery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that are pending delivery.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending Receipt
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that are pending receipt.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pledged
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that are pledged, for example, a financial instrument is unavailable because it has been used or given as a guarantee.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Out For Registration
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities currently being processed by the institution responsible for registering the new beneficial owner (or nominee) of securities after a transaction has settled.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unclassified
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that is unclassified, ie, is not identified with one of the existing sub-balance types.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: InTransshipment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of physical securities that are in transshipment, eg, in the process of being transferred from one depository or agent to another.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligible
x-enumeration-literals.description: Total number of securities eligible for this event.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Registered
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that are registered (in the name of a nominee or of the beneficial owner).(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Street Position
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that remain registered in the name of the prior beneficial owner of securities.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unregistered
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities that could not be registered due to foreign ownership limitation.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Waiting Documentation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Financial instrument is unavailable due to missing or incomplete documentation pertaining to the account, or due to a missing or incomplete order.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Position
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities representing only settled transactions; pending transactions not included.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Being Transferred
x-enumeration-literals.description: Financial instrument is unavailable as a result of a transfer order, pending movement in the shareholders' register.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities representing only settled transactions.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Traded
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of securities representing traded transactions.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Uninstructed Balance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of uninstructed position.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Instructed Balance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Balance of instructed position.(ISO20022)
